data.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md` following the pattern of `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/red-team-review.md` but targeting epic-level spec gaps (not cross-story interactions).

Content requirements:
- Placeholders: `{epic-title}`, `{epic-description}`, `{approach}`
- Three scenario categories with specific examples per category:
  - Runtime: timeouts, race conditions, out-of-order operations, concurrent modifications
  - Deployment: conflicts, first-time setup, environment configuration, CI/CD integration
  - Configuration: misuse, invalid settings, missing defaults, edge cases
- Output format: JSON array with `category`, `title`, `description`, `severity` fields per scenario
- Analysis-only instructions (no file modifications, no commands)
- test-exempt: static asset only (markdown prompt file consumed by LLM agents, no conditional logic, no executable code)

**TDD Requirement**: RED test from dcfe-8be7 fails on prompt-exists and placeholder assertions. After creating this prompt, `test_red_team_prompt_structure` assertions turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Prompt file exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md
- [ ] Prompt has required placeholders
  Verify: grep -q '{epic-title}' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md && grep -q '{epic-description}' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md && grep -q '{approach}' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md
- [ ] Prompt covers runtime, deployment, and configuration categories
  Verify: grep -qi 'runtime' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md && grep -qi 'deployment' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md && grep -qi 'configuration' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md
- [ ] Output schema includes required fields
  Verify: grep -q 'category' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md && grep -q 'severity' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md
